rows.label: tev036002_MSG0001
rows.name:
Fraisie has filled my heart with
with the light... The light of
the Bringer of Miracles...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036002_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Bringer of Miracles
blesses the faithful...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036002_MSG0003
rows.name:
The Bringer of Miracles has saved us poor,
wretched Ma-non from our suffering...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036002_MSG0004
rows.name:
But some, like Staccata, still do do
not believe... How I pity him...[ST:wait ]
